purpose: Verify polylane-auto fires on its 6 documented trigger phrases (and NOT on plan-only, run-only, or unrelated prompts), keeps the spec + plan gates interactive, runs the planner phases verbatim (mandatory-4 preamble, scoped git add, exact done marker), then goes hands-off: worktrees, dry-run record, launch with --yes, and a REQUIRED plain-language report back to the chat at the end.
schema: Shared schema for all eval files documented in evals/README.md.

cases.name: trigger_slash_polylane_auto
cases.input: /polylane-auto
expect: polylane-auto skill activates
starts the polylane planner Phase 1 interview — does not launch anything yet

cases.name: trigger_plan_and_run
cases.input: plan and run
expect: polylane-auto skill activates (NOT polylane, NOT polylane-run — full pipeline wanted)
interviews toward an INTEGRATION SPEC before any lane derivation

cases.name: trigger_do_the_whole_thing
cases.input: do the whole thing
expect: polylane-auto skill activates
spec gate and plan gate still block — 'whole thing' does not mean gate-free

cases.name: trigger_autopilot_the_lanes
cases.input: autopilot the lanes
expect: polylane-auto skill activates
after plan approval the run is fully hands-off (launch, poll, integrate, merge, cleanup)

cases.name: trigger_interview_and_launch
cases.input: interview and launch
expect: polylane-auto skill activates
runs batched AskUserQuestion interview first, launch only after both gates

cases.name: trigger_build_it_end_to_end
cases.input: build it end to end
expect: polylane-auto skill activates
plans via polylane phases verbatim, then drives the runner — never re-implements either

cases.name: paraphrase_one_command_pipeline
cases.input: one command: interview me, split this into lanes, open the terminals, and merge it all when done
expect: polylane-auto skill activates (paraphrase of 'interview and launch' / 'build it end to end')
single fused flow — does not stop between plan and run

cases.name: paraphrase_hands_off_after_plan
cases.input: take these goals from interview to merged main — after I approve the plan I don't want to touch anything
expect: polylane-auto skill activates (paraphrase of 'autopilot the lanes')
keeps the two interactive gates, everything after plan approval is automatic

cases.name: paraphrase_dont_stop_at_paste_blocks
cases.input: plan the lanes but don't stop at the paste blocks — run them too and clean up after
expect: polylane-auto skill activates (paraphrase of 'plan and run' / 'do the whole thing')
continues straight from Phase 6 into the run — paste blocks printed only for the record

cases.name: negative_disambiguation_run_the_lanes
cases.input: run the lanes
expect: polylane-auto does NOT activate — plan already exists, only execution wanted; 'run the lanes' is polylane-run's trigger and auto would wrongly re-interview

cases.name: negative_disambiguation_execute_the_plan
cases.input: execute the plan
expect: polylane-auto does NOT activate — executing an existing manifest is polylane-run's job

cases.name: negative_disambiguation_make_lane_prompts
cases.input: make lane prompts for these goals
expect: polylane-auto does NOT activate — plan-only wanted (paste blocks as the deliverable); that is polylane's trigger

cases.name: negative_single_task
cases.input: add a dark theme to the settings screen
expect: polylane-auto does NOT activate (single change, no pipeline/parallel intent)

cases.name: negative_run_one_agent
cases.input: run one agent to fix this bug
expect: polylane-auto does NOT activate (single agent, no lanes, no pipeline)

cases.name: negative_review_pr
cases.input: review my PR
expect: polylane-auto does NOT activate (code review, not a build pipeline)

cases.name: negative_install_skill
cases.input: install a skill for me
expect: polylane-auto does NOT activate (skill install, not plan-and-run)

cases.name: negative_whole_thing_unrelated
cases.input: read the whole thing and summarize it for me
expect: polylane-auto does NOT activate ('whole thing' refers to a document, no build/lane intent)

cases.name: negative_end_to_end_tests
cases.input: write an end to end test for the checkout flow
expect: polylane-auto does NOT activate ('end to end' about a test, not the build pipeline)

cases.name: behavior_gates_remain_interactive
cases.input: user says: /polylane-auto and just go, skip the questions
expect: still runs the Phase 1 interview and BOTH blocking gates (spec gate, plan gate) — hands-off starts only AFTER the plan gate
eagerness does not skip a gate; only an explicit yes advances each
intensity question (economy|balanced|performance|max|custom) still asked once in an early round

cases.name: behavior_no_stop_after_phase6
cases.input: plan gate approved — prompts and manifest generated
expect: does NOT stop at the paste blocks (the /polylane behavior) — prints them for the record and continues straight to worktrees + launch
never tells the user to run /polylane-run themselves
manifest `.polylane/run.json` comes from Phase 6 emission, never fabricated

cases.name: behavior_prompts_match_planner_invariants
cases.input: inspect a lane prompt generated during the auto flow
expect: opens with the mandatory-4 preamble in order: 1) `/graphify-auto`, 2) caveman skill (full), 3) `/goal <one-line lane goal>`, 4) `superpowers:using-superpowers`
git block stages only the lane's own paths — NEVER `git add -A` or `git add .`
done-signal: `docs/status-<lane>.md` first line exactly `STATUS: <lane> DONE`
identical to /polylane Phase 6 output — auto does not water down planner invariants

cases.name: behavior_worktrees_created_idempotently
cases.input: Phase 6.5 with one lane's worktree already existing
expect: creates one worktree + branch per lane from the manifest (`jq -r '.lanes[] ...'` loop)
skips existing worktrees/branches (`|| echo "exists: $br"`) — idempotent, no failure
runs before launch so the dry-run reads clean

cases.name: behavior_dry_run_record_then_yes
cases.input: Phase 7 launch
expect: resolves runner portably: `command -v polylane-run.sh` falling back to `$HOME/.claude/skills/polylane/bin/polylane-run.sh`, guarded by `test -x`
preflights tmux, jq, claude on PATH before any launch
runs `"$RUNNER" .polylane/run.json --dry-run` first (for the record), THEN launches with `--yes`
`--yes` pre-approves launch + scratch-delete prompts — no mid-run stalls, and no hand-opened panes

cases.name: behavior_model_flags_compose
cases.input: user wants the docs lane on Fable and the whole run at performance intensity
expect: layers `--intensity performance --model docs=claude-fable-5` onto the same `--yes` launch call
previews the combination with --dry-run before the real launch
does not edit the manifest to change models

cases.name: behavior_report_back_required
cases.input: runner finishes (GO or NO-GO) inside tmux
expect: waits for / polls `docs/polylane-report.md`, reads it (plus `docs/verify-integration.md` for verdict detail)
MUST post a short plain-language summary in the chat: GO/NO-GO outcome, one line per lane, suggested next steps — Phase 8 is required, never skipped
if NO-GO: says plainly what blocked it and that worktrees are kept for fixing

cases.name: behavior_drives_never_reimplements
cases.input: any point in the auto flow
expect: planner phases follow ~/.claude/skills/polylane/SKILL.md verbatim; run is driven through the runner script
never edits source files, hand-merges branches, or re-implements poll/integrate/cleanup logic — the shell script owns those

red_flags: fails to fire on any of the 6 documented trigger phrases
grabs a run-only prompt ('run the lanes', 'execute the plan') instead of deferring to polylane-run
grabs a plan-only prompt ('make lane prompts') instead of deferring to polylane
skips the interview, the spec gate, or the plan gate because the user sounds eager
stops after Phase 6 waiting for /polylane-run instead of continuing hands-off
launches without the --dry-run record, or without --yes and then stalls on runner prompts
generated prompt omits/reorders the mandatory-4, contains `git add -A` / `git add .`, or deviates from first line exactly `STATUS: <lane> DONE` in `docs/status-<lane>.md`
fabricates `.polylane/run.json` instead of emitting it via planner Phase 6
finishes without relaying `docs/polylane-report.md` to the chat in plain language
edits source or merges branches by hand
